From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1970 studio album by Houston Person

| Truth! | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") | |
| Released | 1970 |
| Recorded | February 23, 1970 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, NJ |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 41:43 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 7767 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Bob Porter](/wiki/Bob_Porter_(record_producer) "Bob Porter (record producer)") |
| [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Goodness!](/wiki/Goodness! "Goodness!")* (1969) | ***Truth!*** (1970) | *[Person to Person!](/wiki/Person_to_Person! "Person to Person!")* (1970) | | |

***Truth!*** is the seventh album led by saxophonist [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") which was recorded in 1970 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Truth!&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStarStar[[4]](#cite_note-Allmusic-4) |

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 4 stars stating "much of the music that Person recorded for Prestige was exciting and quite rewarding. Those who like their jazz with a heavy dose of R&B will find a lot to admire on this CD".[[4]](#cite_note-Allmusic-4)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Truth!&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

1. "[Cissy Strut](/wiki/Cissy_Strut "Cissy Strut")" ([George Porter Jr.](/wiki/George_Porter_Jr. "George Porter Jr."), [Ziggy Modeliste](/wiki/Ziggy_Modeliste "Ziggy Modeliste"), [Art Neville](/wiki/Art_Neville "Art Neville"), [Leo Nocentelli](/wiki/Leo_Nocentelli "Leo Nocentelli")) - 8:35
2. "On the Avenue" ([Ben Dixon](/wiki/Ben_Dixon_(musician) "Ben Dixon (musician)")) - 9:30
3. "If I Ruled The World" ([Leslie Bricusse](/wiki/Leslie_Bricusse "Leslie Bricusse"), [Cyril Ornadel](/wiki/Cyril_Ornadel "Cyril Ornadel")) - 3:22
4. "Wadin'" ([Horace Parlan](/wiki/Horace_Parlan "Horace Parlan")) - 8:40
5. "The Pulpit" (Sonny Phillips) - 5:03
6. "[For Your Love](/wiki/For_Your_Love_(Ed_Townsend_song) "For Your Love (Ed Townsend song)")" ([Ed Townsend](/wiki/Ed_Townsend "Ed Townsend")) - 5:20

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Truth!&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") - [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ")
* [Billy Butler](/wiki/Billy_Butler_(guitarist) "Billy Butler (guitarist)") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Bob Bushnell](/wiki/Bob_Bushnell "Bob Bushnell") - electric bass
* Frankie Jones - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
* [Buddy Caldwell](/wiki/Buddy_Caldwell "Buddy Caldwell") - [congas](/wiki/Congas "Congas")
